name: Health Potion
description: A small glass vial of red liquid. Tastes like copper and regret, but it works.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A larger, more potent healing draught. Restores 70 HP when consumed. A prized commodity deep in any dungeon.

name: Mana Potion
description: A blue-tinged liquid that shimmers when shaken. Restores arcane energy.

name: Antidote
description: A tightly sealed vial of pale green liquid. Neutralizes poison on contact.

name: Portal Scroll
description: A single-use scroll inscribed with unstable glyphs. Tears open a passage back to town. Don't read it wrong.

name: Buff Potion
description: A frothing amber brew that temporarily sharpens reflexes and strengthens muscles. Grants +5 attack for 5 turns.

name: Bundle of Arrows
description: Ten wooden arrows with iron tips. Standard ammunition.

name: Gold Coins
description: A pouch of worn gold coins. Currency of the realm.

name: Mine Key
description: A heavy iron key stamped with the mine's seal. Opens the gate to the overseer's quarters.

name: Crypt Key
description: Cold iron bearing the crypt's seal. The metal feels heavier than it should.
